response.justification: Despite broad engineering experience across languages and domains, the candidate shows minimal evidence of Java/Kotlin expertise, JVM internals, Spring ecosystem, or enterprise IDE tooling — core requirements for the role. Their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only superficial Java exposure in past roles without depth in IDE subsystems or build tool integration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse tech stacks and domains
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement
Proven ability to lead and teach through workshops and tooling projects
concerns: No demonstrable experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise JVM frameworks
Lack of IDE internals, language server, or compiler tooling background
Java usage is mentioned but not elaborated — no evidence of deep JVM or build tool integration
